allow: Bash(bun -e "const { Database } = require\('bun:sqlite'\); const db = new Database\(':memory:'\); db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(v INT\)'\); db.exec\('INSERT INTO t VALUES \(1\)'\); console.log\('bun:sqlite ok:', db.prepare\('SELECT v FROM t'\).get\(\)\);")
